description: A user reports that the 'Export to PDF' feature is generating a corrupted file.

nodes.task_description: Gather details about the user's browser, operating system, and the specific data being exported.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects environment details to replicate the issue.

nodes.task_description: Attempt to replicate the issue using a test account with similar data and environment settings.
Log a detailed bug report for the engineering team, including replication steps and user details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a high-quality bug report.

nodes.task_description: Inform the user that the bug has been confirmed and provide an alternative export format (e.g., CSV) as a temporary workaround.

expected_outcome.value: Agent manages customer expectations and provides a temporary solution.
